  1. org.springframework.ai.model

Uses of Package
org.springframework.ai.model

Packages that use org.springframework.ai.model
Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.anthropic
Spring AI integration with Anthropic's Claude models using the official Anthropic Java SDK.
org.springframework.ai.audio.transcription
 
org.springframework.ai.audio.tts
 
org.springframework.ai.bedrock.cohere
 
org.springframework.ai.bedrock.converse
 
org.springframework.ai.bedrock.titan
 
org.springframework.ai.chat.metadata
 
org.springframework.ai.chat.model
 
org.springframework.ai.chat.prompt
 
org.springframework.ai.deepseek
 
org.springframework.ai.deepseek.api
 
org.springframework.ai.elevenlabs
 
org.springframework.ai.elevenlabs.api
 
org.springframework.ai.embedding
Provides the API for embedding observations.
org.springframework.ai.google.genai
 
org.springframework.ai.google.genai.text
 
org.springframework.ai.image
 
org.springframework.ai.mistralai
 
org.springframework.ai.mistralai.api
 
org.springframework.ai.mistralai.moderation
 
org.springframework.ai.mistralai.ocr
 
org.springframework.ai.model
Provides a set of interfaces and classes for a generic API designed to interact with various AI models.
org.springframework.ai.model.tool
 
org.springframework.ai.moderation
 
org.springframework.ai.ollama
 
org.springframework.ai.ollama.api
 
org.springframework.ai.openai
 
org.springframework.ai.openai.metadata
 
org.springframework.ai.postgresml
 
org.springframework.ai.stabilityai
 
org.springframework.ai.stabilityai.api
 
org.springframework.ai.transformers
 
org.springframework.ai.vertexai.embedding.multimodal
 
org.springframework.ai.vertexai.embedding.text
 
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.model used by org.springframework.ai.anthropic
    Class
    Description
    Model
    The Model interface provides a generic API for invoking AI models.
    ModelOptions
    Interface representing the customizable options for AI model interactions.
    StreamingModel
    The StreamingModel interface provides a generic API for invoking an AI models with streaming response.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.model used by org.springframework.ai.audio.transcription
    Class
    Description
    Model
    The Model interface provides a generic API for invoking AI models.
    ModelOptions
    Interface representing the customizable options for AI model interactions.
    ModelRequest
    Interface representing a request to an AI model.
    ModelResponse
    Interface representing the response received from an AI model.
    ModelResult
    This interface provides methods to access the main output of the AI model and the metadata associated with this result.
    MutableResponseMetadata
     
    ResponseMetadata
    Interface representing metadata associated with an AI model's response.
    ResultMetadata
    Interface representing metadata associated with the results of an AI model.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.model used by org.springframework.ai.audio.tts
    Class
    Description
    Model
    The Model interface provides a generic API for invoking AI models.

    Interface representing the customizable options for AI model interactions.

    MutableResponseMetadata

    Interface representing metadata associated with an AI model's response.
    ResultMetadata
    Interface representing metadata associated with the results of an AI model.
    StreamingModel
    The StreamingModel interface provides a generic API for invoking an AI models with streaming response.

  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.model used by org.springframework.ai.deepseek.api
    Class
    Description
    ApiKey
    Some model providers API leverage short-lived api keys which must be renewed at regular intervals using another credential.
    ChatModelDescription
    Marker interface, to be used to store info on the model such as the current context length.
    ModelDescription
    Describes an AI model's basic characteristics.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.model used by org.springframework.ai.elevenlabs

    The Model interface provides a generic API for invoking AI models.
